hero.title: Paul Viandier
hero.subtitle: Web Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast
hero.description: 20 years old, passionate about IT, cybersecurity and development

about.title: About
about.content: I am currently training as a web integrator in apprenticeship. My goal is to continue with a fullstack web developer training to deepen my technical skills and master the entire development stack.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal portfolio website developed with Next.js and TypeScript, showcasing my skills and projects.

securitySuite.title: Security Suite
securitySuite.description: Local security suite for protecting and managing IT systems.

dialog.title: Project in development
dialog.description: Security Suite is currently under development. This local security suite, developed with TypeScript, PostgreSQL and Next.js, will be available soon. Stay tuned for updates!
